imagePrompt: A professional 4-panel comic book page, 2x2 grid, sequential art, cyberpunk neo-noir, thick white gutters, clean black borders. Protagonist is a female writer with a long, braided black ponytail and a distressed leather jacket adorned with subtle circuit patterns. TOP-LEFT PANEL: Protagonist, perched on a chimney, sips tea from a spoon, overlooking a futuristic city racetrack, low-angle shot. TOP-RIGHT PANEL: A ghostly, ominous figure of the viceroy looms over a city, with large trucks hauling away bottles and artwork, eye-level shot. BOTTOM-LEFT PANEL: Protagonist, in a dynamic pose, juggles a glowing lantern and inkwell with bungees, confronting a robotic linebacker, dramatic high-angle shot. BOTTOM-RIGHT PANEL: Protagonist stands triumphantly as citizens rejoice, a large vacuum device receding into the background, wide shot, vibrant neon futurism, bold ink outlines, cinematic lighting. NO text, NO speech bubbles, NO dialogue.

definitions.definition: Drool; saliva.

To fall in drops or an unsteady stream, to trickle

To live or pass one's time in a trivial fashion.

definitions.definition: A unit of angle equal to one-sixtieth of a degree.

definitions.definition: (chiefly in the plural, minutes) A (usually formal) written record of a meeting or a part of a meeting.

definitions.definition: A unit of purchase on a telephone or other network, especially a cell phone network, roughly equivalent in gross form to sixty seconds' use of the network.

definitions.definition: A point in time; a moment.

definitions.definition: Of an event, to write in a memo or the minutes of a meeting.

To learn by heart, commit to memory.
An offside play.

definitions.definition: The right-hand side of a working animal such as a horse or bullock, especially when in harness.

In an illegal position ahead of the ball, puck, etc.

definitions.definition: A road, track, path, or street for going under another way or obstacle.
An underground passage, tunnel.
A voyage, especially underwater.
In motion, in progress; being done or carried out; on a journey.
An elastic fabric-bound strap with a hook at each end, used for securing luggage.
An elastic cord tied to the ankles of the jumper in bungee jumping.
A rubber eraser.
An opinion offered in an effort to be helpful.

definitions.definition: Deliberate consideration; knowledge.
(commonly in plural) Information or news given; intelligence

definitions.definition: In language about financial transactions executed by formal documents, an advisory document.

definitions.definition: In commercial language, information communicated by letter; used chiefly in reference to drafts or bills of exchange

definitions.definition: A communication providing information, such as how an uncertain area of law might apply to possible future actions
definitions.example: An advice issued by a Monitoring Committee could be applicable in a Dutch court

definitions.definition: Counseling to perform a specific legal act.
Counseling to perform a specific illegal act.
In aspect-oriented programming, the code whose execution is triggered when a join point is reached.
Any flammable substance.
Capable of burning, especially a liquid.
Easily set on fire.
Subject to easy ignition and rapid flaming combustion.
An alignment of astronomical objects whereby one object comes between the observer (or notional observer) and another object, thus obscuring the latter.

Especially, an alignment whereby a planetary object (for example, the Moon) comes between the Sun and another planetary object (for example, the Earth), resulting in a shadow being cast by the middle planetary object onto the other planetary object.
A seasonal state of plumage in some birds, notably ducks, adopted temporarily after the breeding season and characterised by a dull and scruffy appearance.
Obscurity, decline, downfall
Of astronomical bodies, to cause an eclipse.

definitions.definition: To overshadow; to be better or more noticeable than.
(Irish grammar) To undergo eclipsis.
A special group or social class of people which have a superior intellectual, social or economic status as, the elite of society.
Someone who is among the best at a certain task.
The act of validating something.
Something, such as a certificate, that validates something; attestation, authentication, confirmation, proof or verification.
The process whereby others confirm the validity of one's emotions.
The process of identifying a new prisoner's gang affiliation.
A region of space that contains no matter.
(plural only "vacuums") A vacuum cleaner.
The condition of rarefaction, or reduction of pressure below that of the atmosphere, in a vessel, such as the condenser of a steam engine, which is nearly exhausted of air or steam, etc.

definitions.definition: A spacetime having tensors of zero magnitude
To clean (something) with a vacuum cleaner.
To use a vacuum cleaner.
To optimise a database or database table by physically removing deleted tuples.
To denounce as harmful.
To blame for ills.
To decrease the motivation of a person or a group.
To lay out or plan a new version of something previously laid out or planned.

A musical art form rooted in West African cultural and musical expression and in the African American blues tradition, with diverse influences over time, commonly characterized by blue notes, syncopation, swing, call and response, polyrhythms and improvisation.
Energy, excitement, excitability.
The substance or makeup of a thing.

definitions.definition: Unspecified thing(s).

definitions.definition: (with positive terms) Something of excellent quality, the genuine article.

definitions.definition: Nonsense.

definitions.definition: Semen, jizz.
To destroy.

definitions.definition: To play (jazz music).
To dance to the tunes of jazz music.
To enliven, brighten up, make more colourful or exciting; excite
To complicate.

definitions.definition: To have sex for money, to prostitute oneself.
To move (around/about) in a lively or frivolous manner; to fool around.
To distract or pester.

definitions.definition: To ejaculate.
A formal council summoned (especially by a monarch) to discuss important issues.

In many countries, the legislative branch of government, a deliberative assembly or set of assemblies whose elected or appointed members meet to debate the major political issues of the day, make, amend, and repeal laws, authorize the executive branch of government to spend money, and in some cases exercise judicial powers; a legislature.

A particular assembly of the members of such a legislature, as convened for a specific purpose or period of time (commonly designated with an ordinal number – for example, first parliament or 12th parliament – or a descriptive adjective – for example, Long Parliament, Short Parliament and Rump Parliament).

definitions.definition: A gathering of birds, especially rooks or owls.
Parliament cake, a type of gingerbread.
The arts, customs, lifestyles, background, and habits that characterize a particular society or nation.
The beliefs, values, behaviour and material objects that constitute a people's way of life.
The conventional conducts and ideologies of a community; the system comprising of the accepted norms and values of a society.
Any knowledge passed from one generation to the next, not necessarily with respect to human beings.

The process of growing a bacterial or other biological entity in an artificial medium.
The growth thus produced.

definitions.definition: A group of bacteria.
The details on a map that do not represent natural features of the area delineated, such as names and the symbols for towns, roads, meridians, and parallels.
A recurring assemblage of artifacts from a specific time and place that may constitute the material culture remains of a particular past human society.

To increase the artistic or scientific interest (in something) (compare cultivate)

Close connection, unison, rigid synchronization.
An inflexible, rigid or stifling pattern.
The necrosis or rotting of flesh, usually caused by lack of blood supply.

definitions.definition: A damaging or corrupting influence.
To produce gangrene in.
To be affected with gangrene.
To corrupt; To cause to become degenerate.
An expression of gratitude.
A short prayer said at meals; grace, a benediction.
A public celebration in acknowledgement of divine favour.

Son of the same parents as another person.
A male having at least one parent in common with another (see half-brother, stepbrother).

definitions.definition: A form of address to a man.

definitions.definition: A black male.
Somebody, usually male, connected by a common cause or situation.
Someone who is a peer, whether male or female.
To treat as a brother.

A piece of cloth shaped like a handkerchief to be worn about the neck; a neckerchief or neckcloth.

Often followed by up: to make happy; to brighten, to cheer, to enliven.

definitions.definition: Experiencing the effect of favourable fortune; favored by fortune or luck; fortunate, lucky, propitious.

To emphasize a point repeatedly.
